evidence_summary: Reintroduce an ally through a reunion in a high-traffic urban center to establish the political instability caused by Sab Than's marriage maneuvers.

In the central plaza of Zodanga, Carter reunites with Kantos Kan. They discuss the volatile political situation involving Sab Than's attempt to marry Dejah Thoris (if she were alive) to force a peace treaty with Helium.
john_carter enters the bustling zodanga_central_plaza looking for an ally.
john_carter and kantos_kan stand in tense stillness amidst moving crowds.
A reunion turns from personal relief into shared political dread.
